title: Cryptocurrency trading platform Backpack launches on-chain IPO service with Superstate
message_html: Cryptocurrency trading platform Backpack launches on-chain IPO service with Superstate ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Cryptocurrency trading platform Backpack has announced the launch of its on-chain IPO service. Users can receive IPO share allocations directly through Backpack, with the underlying infrastructure provided by Superstate. The shares represent actual equity and support d
